title: micranthus triticeus
intro: Micranthus triticeus, also known as the "Small-flowered Micranthus", is a flowering plant native to the southern regions of Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Micranthus triticeus often involve making teas or infusions from the leaves and flowers, which can be used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
